name: Orange-Glazed Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute: Frozen, unsweetened pitted Tart cherries (thaw and drain), or 3 cups (16 ounces) pitted, red tart cherries (drained).
2. Preheat oven to 425°F.
3. Prepare the 9-inch pie as directed, except make a lattice top crust.
4. In a large bowl, mix sugar and flour. Stir in cherries and dot with margarine.
5. Place filling into pastry-lined pie plate.
6. Cover with lattice top crust; seal and flute edges.
7. Cover the edge with a 2- to 3-inch strip of aluminum foil to prevent excessive browning.
8. Remove foil during the last 15 minutes of baking.
9. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until crust is brown and juice begins to bubble through slits in the crust.
10. Spoon Orange Glaze over the center of the warm pie (do not allow glaze to run over the edge).
ORANGE GLAZE: Mix powdered sugar, finely shredded orange peel, and orange juice.
8 servings; 475 calories per serving.
